message:
style(tests): rustfmt cleanup in connector_cursor + e2e_lexical_fail_open

Pure rustfmt-driven reflow of two helpers whose bodies had grown past the
formatter's line-length threshold:

- tests/connector_cursor.rs
    - `load_cursor_fixture`: inline the two `.unwrap_or_else(|err| panic!(...))`
      closures onto a single chained form (matches rustfmt output for a
      post-grow chain).
    - `scan_cursor_fixture`: split the long `assert_eq!(convs.len(), 1,
      "...")` over three lines (rustfmt expansion).

- tests/e2e_lexical_fail_open.rs
    - `serde_json::from_str(...).unwrap_or_else(|err| panic!(...))`: reformat
      with the closure on its own block (rustfmt expansion for the long
      message).

Zero semantic change; zero assertion change. Pure whitespace/layout.
Keeps `cargo fmt --check` clean now that earlier assertion-hardening
pushed these lines past the 100-column soft limit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
